content:
Ob Nixilis, Captive Kingpin. There is so much synergy in this commander.
In the Rakdos space I think this commander completely takes over. There isn't another commander in Rakdos that competes. The closest thing in rakdos to this power is probably Florian

When playing ob nixilis it is good to make sure you have an engine ready to go when you go to play ob nixilis. If you just cast him with nothing else. There is a good chance he is getting removed.

![My Favorite](https://www.magic-ville.com/pics/big/mat/176.jpg)

===accordion
===panel:Win cons

1. [[All will be one]] any 1 point of damage makes this go infinite.

2. [[Reckless fireweaver]] or [[hedron detonator]] or [[Weftstalker Ardent]] // [[sensei's divining top]] // [[birgi, God of Storytelling]] or [[prosper, tome-bound]] or [[Glaring Fleshraker]]

3. [[underworld breach]] // [[Grinding station]] // [[mox amber]] or [[mox opal]] etc // [[walking ballista]] or [[Reckless fireweaver]] or [[hedron detonator]] or [[Weftstalker Ardent]]

4. [[Agatha's Soul Cauldron]] exile [[walking balista]] this allows you to ping for infinite damage with Ob Nixilis, Captive Kingpin. Remove a counter to do a point of damage. This will add another counter that can be removed. If you exile balista off the top worst case cast it for 0

===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: Interesting synergies

1. [[Kederekt parasite]] gets you a lot of card advantage.

2. [[Black Mage's Rod]], [[Vivi's Persistence]] and [[kessig flamebreather]] these specify non-creature allowing artifacts and enchantments addition to instants and sorceries to trigger Ob Nixilis.

3. [[Glaring Fleshraker]] when you cast artifacts like [[sensei's divining top]] not only do you make colorless mana but you also ping for 1 to each opponent.

[[Imperial Recruiter]] is still very good. This can still search out [[Kessig Flamebreather]] [[Prosper, Tome-Bound]] or [[walking ballista]] which are all very good for our strategy.

===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: Why I'm not using certain strategies and cards currently

1. [[Wheel of fortune]]. 
This card is... well fine. It's not amazing. It is cute with [[Kederekt Parasite]] and [[orcish bow master]] but you have so much card advantage already it isn't necessary. This isn't a wheels build.
*Though with the addition of orchish bow master wheeling feels more enticing than before.*

2. [[Professional face-breaker]]
I am trying to find ways to cut more creatures. So that I can play urabrask. The issue is getting Ob Nixilix out early feels very important. The reason you play him is for the card advantage he provides. Similar to why you want to rush out tymna or kraum. This one feel likes a split decision on where the build is heading for me. Do I cut the additional speed for pingers. Or do I cut into the instants and sorceries 

3. [[Rakdos Charm]] Turns out this doesn't work because all the damage is dealt at once.

4. [[Shaman's Trance]] this is only just something I wanted to test. It steals a breach line or just stops one. It can also be used to take someone else's ad nauseum after they have used it. Things like that.

5. [[Iridescent Vinelasher]] 1 to 2 cards max per turn rotation is not good enough if you cast it at 3 mana then it becomes 2 to 4 but you would have to get it early and get your land drop after. Otherwise this isn't good enough.

6. Goodbye [[gleeful arsonist]] hello [[shadow of the goblin]] Its usually better to control your own destiny.

===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: Recent bans...

This deck was hit pretty hard but may not be to bad off. Dockside was not a main focus of the plan. I always thought top lines were better. Ob is only 4 MV which isn't to bad. Ad naus strategies are a lot worse now. So this may be one of the fastest decks in the format now.

[[Jeweled lotus]] and [[mana crypt]] have been switched out for [[Jeweled Amulet]] and [[Everflowing Chalice]] though they aren't perfect trade out they do cost 0 and have an impact on casting ob nixilis. Being 0 mana is important for they trigger our pingers and can be utilized with Grinding station.

===endpanel
===endaccordion

===accordion
===panel: Things I want to try!

A more creature heavy strategy seems interesting to me. Running things like [[Sardian Avenger]] [[loyal apprentice]] and [[Flame Fusillade]] all sound really fun. Maybe try things like impact tremors and phyrexian altar to sacrifice tokens for mana. I am working on a casual list to get a feel.

[[Drannith Magistrate]] pretty hard. Though you can still play lands and your commander still gets bigger
[[Collector ouphe]] is also an issue a lot of our combos include artifacts.

[[Vindictive Warden]] This could be a good get off jail free card. Or if we can make infinite mana using [[underworld breach]] lines. We can just do infinite damage with our infinite mana. This probably won't go in but if we see another card like dockside extortionist in the future it could be up for consideration.

===endpanel
===endaccordion
